resonance_events.excerpt: I was myself the whole space in which the pictures were placed – this body being one of the pictures.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Two pairs of eyes were then gripping each other... I lost all sense of body.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: This experience lasted for a brief eternity.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: I discovered it [the mind] did not exist! I was bewildered. I simply sat like a statue.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Beschreibt den totalen Verlust des Körpergefühls während eines Augenkontakts mit Ramana Maharshi.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Berichtet von einer Verschiebung der Raumwahrnehmung, bei der das eigene Ich als der Raum wahrgenommen wird, in dem der Körper nur ein Bild ist.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Thematisiert die Auflösung des Zeitgefühls als "kurze Ewigkeit".
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Dokumentiert die Erkenntnis der Nicht-Existenz des Geistes (Mind) durch direkte Erfahrung.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Beschreibt die anfängliche Angst vor der "Gefährlichkeit" dieser totalen Auflösung.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.
